name: exactypes

metadata.name: exactypes
metadata.summary: Helps creating typed ctypes-based python library

documentation:
# exactypes

Helps creating typed ctypes-based python library.

Code examples can be found in [examples](./examples/).

## Installation

Use `pip` or whatever package/project managers to install:

```shell
pip install exactypes
```

modules.name: exactypes.cfuncs.restype
documentation: Specially annotated types used in return value annotations.

modules.name: exactypes
documentation: Helps creating typed ctypes-based python library.

modules.name: exactypes.cfuncs.argtypes
documentation: Specially annotated types used in parameter annotations.

variables.name: exactypes.cfuncs.argtypes.VaArgs
documentation: C `...` va_args marker.

functions.name: exactypes.cdataobject.refsolver.get_unresolved_names
documentation: Get the unresolved names from a type string.
from typing import TypeVar
T = TypeVar("T")

classes.name: exactypes.cdataobject.refsolver.RefCache
documentation: A weakref cache for resolving types.

functions.name: exactypes.cfuncs.ccall
documentation:
Decorator for wrapping a ctypes function.

```
param lib

The ctypes library including the function you want to wrap.

param override_name

Override the name of the wrapped function. If , use the decorated                           function's name.
```

classes.name: exactypes.cfuncs.CFnType
documentation:
Wrapper for `CFUNCTYPE`.

Create a CFunctionType with:

```pycon
>>> CFnType[[argtype1, argtype2, ...], restype]
```

classes.name: exactypes.cfuncs.CFnType
documentation:
Wrapper for `CFUNCTYPE`.

Create a CFunctionType with:

```pycon
>>> CFnType[[argtype1, argtype2, ...], restype]
```

classes.name: exactypes.cfuncs.CCallWrapper
documentation:
A wrapper for python callables annotated with ctypes types.

This class is used to wrap C functions with python functions annotated with ctypes types.
The wrapped callable can be called as if it were a normal python function.

functions.name: exactypes.cdataobject.cstruct
documentation:
A decorator to resolve annotated fields of a ctypes structure class.

```
param cls

The struct class to be wrapped.

param pack

The alignment of the struct.

param align

The alignment of the struct.

param defaults

Whether to use default values for unresolved fields.

param cachens

The cache for the type.
```

functions.name: exactypes.cdataobject.cunion
documentation:
A decorator to resolve annotated fields of a ctypes union class.

```
param cls

The union class to be wrapped.

param pack

The alignment of the struct.

param align

The alignment of the struct.

param cachens

The cache for the type.
```

modules.name: exactypes.cdataobject.datafield
documentation: Specially annotated types used in cdataobject (Structure/Union) field annotations.

functions.name: exactypes.cdataobject.datafield.value
documentation:
Stub value, used when you do not use .pyi stub (in which you can simply write `...` instead of
this).

functions.name: exactypes.cdataobject.datafield.array_of
documentation:
A shortcut to get specific array type for given type or name.

```
param tp

Type or name of the type to get array for.

return

Array type or CArrayField for given type or name, without array size.
```

classes.name: exactypes.cdataobject.datafield.CDataField
documentation:
A symbol to store typed generic data with auto-conversion.
Only benefits static type checkers by using descriptor methods.

```pycon
>>> CDataField[AutoConvertedPythonType, CType]
```

classes.name: exactypes.cdataobject.datafield.CArrayField
documentation: Similar to `CDataField`, but for C array types.

classes.name: exactypes.cdataobject.datafield.CFlexibleArray
documentation: A real descriptor to help access C flexible array member.

functions.name: exactypes.array.offset_of
documentation:
Apply offset on given array or pointer.

```
param cobj

An array or a pointer for applying offset.

param ofs

N offset to skip .

param asptrtype

Pointer type to be returned, same with  if not given.

return

A new pointer based on the offset.
```

functions.name: exactypes.array.of
documentation:
A shortcut to get specific supplement array type for given type or name.

```
param tp

Type or name of the type to get array for.

return

Supplemented array type for given type or name, without array size.
```

classes.name: exactypes.array.Array
documentation: Supplement array type with various dynamic features (MAYBE SLOW!)

classes.name: exactypes.array._CompatArray
documentation: Type symbol to contain auto-converted Python types.

classes.name: exactypes.array._CompatStrBytesArray
documentation: Type symbol to contain auto-converted Python str/bytes types.
